        self,
        client: httpx.Client,
        local_source_server,

    ) -> None:

            client,

            "/textual_whitespace.csv",
            b"code,label\n A10 ,padded\nA10,plain\nB210,other\n",

                client,
                dataset_id,
                params={"code__exact": " A10 "},
            )
